actions: Confirmed App Secret field type is password and existing state is stored-redacted.
Entered a unique test secret value.
Checked visible text, rendered output, and password input DOM value.

defect.expected: After saving App Secret, the UI should show only a stored-redacted state and clear the password input value.
defect.actual: Visible text and API output are redacted, but the App Secret password input still retains the submitted secret in its DOM value after save.
reproduction: Enter a value in App Secret.
Evaluate or inspect the password input value after save.
